title: Personal Image Diagnosis Consulting Board AI
sourceTitle: Personal Image Diagnosis Consulting Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical personal style diagnosis consulting board for an adult woman with soft round face, warm skin tone, shoulder-length dark hair. Include English modules: Face Shape, Color Season, Hair Notes, Outfit Direction, Accessories, Style Keywords. Clean beige editorial board, portrait photo area, color swatches, outfit thumbnails, fine line callouts, premium consultation report aesthetic. English-only visible text. No Chinese characters anywhere. Clean readable English labels. No watermarks, no fake platform logos, no unreadable pseudo text. variant focus: Personal Image Diagnosis Consulting Board V1. visible text language: English only.
